citations.narrative:
There is no documentation maintained to indicate that an annual review of the contingency plan has been completed. The
date listed on the contingency plan is 25 July 2022. Failure to review the plan may result in an adverse impact to animal
welfare during emergencies, such as delay in seeking medical care. The contingency plan must be reviewed by the facility
on at least an annual basis to ensure that it adequately addresses all required contingency-related criteria and that no
updates or changes need to be made to the plan such as changes made as a result of any recent unforeseen
circumstance or the addition of new species. The facility must maintain documentation of their contingency plan annual
reviews including documenting any amendments or changes made since the previous year's review.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.134(b) 
   
Contingency planning. 
There is no documentation maintained to indicate that an annual review of the contingency plan has been completed. The 
date listed on the contingency plan is 25 July 2022. Failure to review the plan may result in an adverse impact to animal 
welfare during emergencies, such as delay in seeking medical care. The contingency plan must be reviewed by the facility 
on at least an annual basis to ensure that it adequately addresses all required contingency-related criteria and that no 
updates or changes need to be made to the plan such as changes made as a result of any recent unforeseen 
circumstance or the addition of new species. The facility must maintain documentation of their contingency plan annual 
reviews including documenting any amendments or changes made since the previous year's review. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
